deals.title: Alstom acquires Bombardier EU maintenance contracts
deals.summary: Alstom strengthens its European maintenance footprint by acquiring the remaining EU maintenance contracts from Bombardier Transportation, covering 12 depots across France and Germany.

deals.title: Nordic Aviation Capital raises €1.2B green bond
deals.summary: NAC closes its largest ever green bond issuance to fund the acquisition of next-generation narrow-body aircraft, targeting A320neo and 737 MAX deliveries through 2028.

deals.title: CMA CGM acquires Hamburg Sud feeder network
deals.summary: CMA CGM expands its Northern European short-sea presence with the acquisition of Hamburg Sud's feeder network, adding 23 vessels and 8 port concessions.

deals.title: Safran & MTU expand CFM LEAP MRO joint venture in Poland
deals.summary: Safran Aircraft Engines and MTU Aero Engines commit €210M capex to expand their joint MRO facility in Warsaw, doubling LEAP engine overhaul capacity to meet surging demand.
